summary: Verified merged Contact page with Online Enquiries feature. All features working: (1) GET /api/website-admin/contact-settings/public returns phone and emails array, (2) PUT /api/website-admin/contact-settings saves and persists data, (3) GET /api/website-admin/contact-settings returns saved data with auth, (4) /shop/stores redirects to /shop/contact via React Router, (5) Contact page loads with hero, Online Enquiries section, showrooms grid, contact form, and footer CTA, (6) Online Enquiries shows phone card and 3 email cards with correct data, (7) Admin panel at /admin/contact-page-settings shows OnlineEnquiriesEditor with phone input and email rows, (8) Admin can add/remove email entries and save.

minor.endpoint: Default feature cards and benefits bar
minor.issue: Some default fallback values in backend still reference /shop/stores instead of /shop/contact. These work due to React Router redirect but could be updated for consistency.

seed_data_creation: Contact settings seeded via curl: phone='01234 567890', emails=[{label:'Orders',email:'orders@tilestation.co.uk'},{label:'Quotes',email:'quotes@tilestation.co.uk'},{label:'General Enquiries',email:'info@tilestation.co.uk'}]
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact page merge complete. /shop/stores redirects to /shop/contact via React Router (App.js line 564). Online Enquiries section shows phone and categorized emails from /api/website-admin/contact-settings/public. Admin panel at /admin/contact-page-settings has OnlineEnquiriesEditor component at bottom of ShowroomsManager page. Contact form submission is MOCKED (simulated delay, no actual email sending).

backend_apis: ✓ GET /api/website-admin/contact-settings/public - returns phone and emails array
✓ GET /api/website-admin/contact-settings - returns data with admin auth
✓ PUT /api/website-admin/contact-settings - saves phone and emails, persists to DB
frontend_contact_page: ✓ Online Enquiries section with phone card (01234 567890)
✓ Showrooms grid with 4 showrooms (Gravesend, Chingford, Tonbridge, Sydenham)
✓ Contact form with all fields (name, email, phone, showroom, subject, message)
✓ Contact form submission shows success message
admin_panel: ✓ 3 email rows with label and email inputs
✓ Add Email button adds new row

mocked_apis.contact_form_submission: Contact form handleSubmit uses simulated delay (setTimeout), not connected to actual email service
